title: Three cargo ships struck off Iran's coast, UK says, including one in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The incidents mark the latest in a string of reported attacks in or near to the Strait of Hormuz, where shipping traffic has virtually ground to a halt.
summary_public: The incidents mark the latest in a string of reported attacks in or near to the Strait of Hormuz, where shipping traffic has virtually ground to a halt.
